title: ctenitis latifrons
intro: Ctenitis latifrons, also known as the Japanese polypody or latifrons fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant traditionally used in East Asian medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis latifrons include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ctenitis latifrons include infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed as teas or added to traditional remedies.
